case_title: ROBERTO RODRIGUEZ VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ROBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ROBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK $1,429.01 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,469.01, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
